description: Cross-asset systematic trend desk - the CTA / managed-futures sleeve. Risk-adjusted 3-horizon time-series momentum over 21 liquid 1x ETF proxies, inverse-vol sized to a 10% portfolio-vol target. The crisis diversifier. Output data/trend-engine.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Cross-asset trend desk - daily 23:50 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the US close once EOD prices settle and 20 min behind the pairs desk to stagger FMP load. The classic EventBridge 300-rule pool is saturated; Scheduler is the go-forward scheduling path.
